name: Teriyaki Finger Steaks
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim fat from the steak and slice lengthwise into 1/2 inch strips.
2. Place the slices in a large glass bowl.
3. Combine all remaining ingredients in a separate bowl.
4. Pour the marinade over the meat and toss gently to coat evenly.
5. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for 2 to 3 hours.
6. Drain the meat, discarding the marinade.
7. Loosely thread the meat strips onto skewers.
8. Grill over medium-hot coals, turning often, for 7 to 10 minutes or until the meat reaches the desired doneness.
9. Remove from skewers and serve.
